results.title: Review My Design: Increase your conversions with simple and free design review | Product Hunt
results.content: Title: Review My Design: Increase your conversions with simple and free design review | Product Hunt [...] Review My Design: Increase your conversions with simple and free design review | Product Hunt [...] into Knowledge. Transform Coding Sessions into Knowledge. After doing hundreds of reviews as a hobby I thought I may as well publish this on PH🙂 Why do this free? Many reasons: - Most important one is networking - Another goal is to gather data of the most common design mistakes made by sites. - Help to make the internet a more pleasant place to surf. Congrats on the launch this looks awesome! are you guys planning on expanding past landing pages? i.e. design review for google ads visuals?

results.title: Review Reply AI | Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds | Product Hunt
results.content: Review Reply AI | Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds | Product Hunt [...] Title: Review Reply AI | Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds | Product Hunt [...] responses is tedious. Most end up with "Thank you for your kind words!" on repeat. This tool gives you three distinct options per review — a warm thank-you, a professional response, and an empathetic one. You just pick the best fit and paste it. I'm launching at $19/mo unlimited because I think review management tools are overpriced. The free tier (5/month, no signup) is permanent. Would love your feedback — especially from anyone running a local business!
